Cobalt Boots  
 

Lore Item
Slot: FEET
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 25
Effect: Strength of the Kunzar (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Cobalt Boots
Lore Item
Slot: FEET
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 25
Effect: Strength of the Kunzar (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):50, 50, 60
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:330 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:940
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-12 00:01:01
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Karnor's Castle
NPC Name
caller of Sathir


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Karnor's Castle


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
#REDACTED, Posted: May 22 2003 at 4:16 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I solo'd the caller of sathir as a 55 bst. sold boots to vendor for 314 pp. worth 1.5K in baz.
got a luccky break
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2003 at 1:15 AM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
Scholar
42 posts
I hadn't even given these a thought when I got into good group on LCY tonight. Actually, I had never seen these drop while I played my ranger there. My warrior was working toward getting 49 when a couple people announced they were leaving after the next pull. The group was gonna break up. So, I went and grabbed a couple of mob to kill and WOO HOO, these drop. When I got into the group, they said in advance it was need before greed, and they honored that statement by giving me these. Thank you group, they are awesome.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 08 2003 at 6:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) grr wtf iksars cant use these? GRR!
stats/buff
QuoteReply
# Nov 01 2002 at 9:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770931271
168 posts
I have these. Its a right clickable strength buff. At level 46 it becomes clickable. At level 60 it adds 25 strength. It is self only. The gloves are able to cast on others but the strength is only 15 and counts down to neg 15 of your normal before wearing off.
▲ Page top
RE: stats/buff
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2002 at 2:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758553670
17 posts
It actually becomes clickable at 45. My warrior friend just looted them on 11-08-2002. He is still only 45 and can click them.
▲ Page top
Self Only
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2002 at 10:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250653639
33 posts
Only increases your strength, not targetable and
it does not stack with the reckless strength
buff. Reckless strength buff is targetable.
Shrink is targetable. Lesser Shielding is not
targetable. Anyone know if invigorate is
targetable or self only???
▲ Page top
RE: Self Only
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2002 at 1:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251329529
3 posts
invigorate is not targetable.
▲ Page top
What lvl to get Proc?
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2002 at 9:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966246844
View User Forum
3 posts
Does anyone know for certain what lvl these boots will cast?

I just bought a pair for my lvl 16 troll warrior and they won't cast yet "you are not high enough lvl to use this effect". (yah this char is twinked' so what? all of my others aren't)

I've heard rumors ranging from lvl 25 to 46 anyone know for certain?
▲ Page top
RE: What lvl to get Proc?
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2002 at 12:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757938325
1 post
They Right-Click at lvl 45
▲ Page top
RE: What lvl to get Proc?
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2002 at 6:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253372954
Scholar
34 posts
These boots will begin to cast at level 45. My Dwarf warrior got them at lvl 44 and they would not work. He just made level 45 and they work fine now. Good Luck.
▲ Page top
price
QuoteReply
# May 05 2002 at 12:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770265326
View User Forum
2 posts
There as low as 4k on Vazaelle.
▲ Page top
str of the kunzar
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2001 at 7:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758357601
1 post
is str of the kunzar better than reckless strength? i know they don't stack so i was just wondering which is worth it more.
▲ Page top
RE: str of the kunzar
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2002 at 11:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1649292544618
Scholar
92 posts
MUCH better. With reckless str, your str drops slowly until it's actually -5 below your normal level. Str of Kunzar is straight-up +25str buff, which comes in very handy if there are no shammies or druids in the group.
▲ Page top
RE: str of the kunzar
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2002 at 3:43 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248482867
71 posts
And if there are no rangers, beastlords or druids. There are numbers between "0" and "100".
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 08 2001 at 6:58 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) is it still for sale?
Effect
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2001 at 1:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765758382
1 post
The +25 str isn't really that good, because a shaman can give you over twice that with their buff. So, this would only be really usefull if you were soloing or in a group without a buffer.
▲ Page top
RE: Effect
QuoteReply
# Mar 02 2003 at 9:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1681085854507
8 posts
in fact shamies got better buff...

i usually play with one... but i also often duo with a cleric : reason why I WANT THOSE BOOTS ! :D

and in some situations this can save your bear-lover's mana...
▲ Page top
RE: Effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2003 at 1:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759911393
61 posts
your totally right, yet still missing a totally obvious fact that is present. there are alot less shaman then warrior out there, a warrior will not always get lucky enough to have a shammy with them at all times. when i dont have a shammy around, 25 extra str rocks my world, and even when a shammy is around, these have 25 ac! that is a huge bonus regardless of what buffs you have, especially for a mid 40's drop item.

best of luck to ya in all your undertakings, stay safe and have fun. 8)
▲ Page top
Effect level
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2001 at 10:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248236282
12 posts
What level is the effect usable? 46?

-Glamdrin
▲ Page top
RE: Effect level
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2001 at 10:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251910041
48 posts
i've heard that all the kunark class specific armor (cobalt, deepwater, blood ember etc. etc.) proc at 45
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 31 2001 at 2:22 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) 1
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 11 2001 at 1:22 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Edited, Tue May 28 14:46:20 2002
Hands room
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2001 at 9:50 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965982686
1 post
I had the best night I've ever had last night in Karnos. Got in a great group. Three Warriors, cleric, Shammy, and Chanter. We fought our way into the Hands room, and loot started to drop. First drop was the Cobalt Boots, and I won the roll. Only the warriors rolled, typically in Karnos it's need before greed, but it's up to the group. ES Gaunts BE gaunts and a Springwood club also dropped in about 2 hours. All on a weeknight. Three of us also Dinged. What a night!
▲ Page top
great boots
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2001 at 8:17 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763324712
45 posts
These boots are amazing, they have great AC and are a right click effect of +25 str which is killer, they are curenly going for 9000 to 10,000 pp on the tarew marr server
▲ Page top
This boots.
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2001 at 7:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762697604
17 posts
Got em today in KC, 25 AC. They look dark blue when weared, very dark compared to the rest of the set, the proc is a slow casting 25 str buff that lasts for a long long time, nice atk boost.

# Jun 15 2001 at 3:33 PM Rating: Default

got my pair today in KC

as warrior me always took ac over other stats it helps in the long run, tough call though hehe

Correction
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2000 at 5:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343949949
Scholar
233 posts
The above says the boots give a +25 to Cha. Not seeing it on the item description. As far as I know it gives a +25 to Str with the effect.
▲ Page top
RE: Correction
QuoteReply
# Mar 02 2001 at 5:33 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756009492
9 posts
Where does it say +25cha?

Looks like it says 25ac to me. And this buff is very handy btw, i use it all the time, puts your attk up in duels and also your rangers and druid dont want to have to have the str buff memed and have to shout for one all the time.
▲ Page top
RE: Correction
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2000 at 5:06 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593965731977
Scholar
42 posts
It does. +25 str, non stacking with any str buff out there. Not really a perma +25 str, most high level groups have a buffer that always gives a str buff.
